markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Explore potential collaboration between Shaped and GrowthX for AI-driven content creation and distribution services.](https://fathom.video/share/EhCEDjnJpZPueW4qt3jaxTNrXUFVyHJ7?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX offers end-to-end AI-powered content creation, including research, writing, and publishing, with human editors in the loop](https://fathom.video/share/EhCEDjnJpZPueW4qt3jaxTNrXUFVyHJ7?tab=summary&timestamp=35.0)
  - [Shaped is interested but cautious about content quality, distribution, and measurable ROI within a 2-3 month pilot period](https://fathom.video/share/EhCEDjnJpZPueW4qt3jaxTNrXUFVyHJ7?tab=summary&timestamp=940.0)
  - [Next steps include GrowthX sending an SOW and potentially helping Shaped set up analytics tools like Koala for better lead tracking](https://fathom.video/share/EhCEDjnJpZPueW4qt3jaxTNrXUFVyHJ7?tab=summary&timestamp=2019.0)

## Topics

### Company Backgrounds and Offerings

  - [Shaped: AI-driven personalization platform for recommendations, search, and content across various use cases](https://fathom.video/share/EhCEDjnJpZPueW4qt3jaxTNrXUFVyHJ7?tab=summary&timestamp=183.0)
      - [40 customers, recent Series A funding, looking to expand marketing efforts](https://fathom.video/share/EhCEDjnJpZPueW4qt3jaxTNrXUFVyHJ7?tab=summary&timestamp=295.0)
      - [Primary growth through outbound sales, aiming for larger accounts](https://fathom.video/share/EhCEDjnJpZPueW4qt3jaxTNrXUFVyHJ7?tab=summary&timestamp=362.0)
  - [GrowthX: AI-powered content creation and distribution service](https://fathom.video/share/EhCEDjnJpZPueW4qt3jaxTNrXUFVyHJ7?tab=summary&timestamp=475.0)
      - [Uses LLM workflows to research, plan, and create high-quality content at scale](https://fathom.video/share/EhCEDjnJpZPueW4qt3jaxTNrXUFVyHJ7?tab=summary&timestamp=786.0)
      - [Produces 20 million words per month across various clients](https://fathom.video/share/EhCEDjnJpZPueW4qt3jaxTNrXUFVyHJ7?tab=summary&timestamp=1087.0)
      - [Offers full-service approach, including CMS integration and publishing](https://fathom.video/share/EhCEDjnJpZPueW4qt3jaxTNrXUFVyHJ7?tab=summary&timestamp=837.0)

### Content Creation Process

  - [GrowthX employs a multi-step AI workflow with human oversight:](https://fathom.video/share/EhCEDjnJpZPueW4qt3jaxTNrXUFVyHJ7?tab=summary&timestamp=786.0)
      - [Extensive research and topic planning](https://fathom.video/share/EhCEDjnJpZPueW4qt3jaxTNrXUFVyHJ7?tab=summary&timestamp=786.0)
      - [AI-assisted content generation with editorial reviews](https://fathom.video/share/EhCEDjnJpZPueW4qt3jaxTNrXUFVyHJ7?tab=summary&timestamp=1079.0)
      - [Iterative improvement based on performance data](https://fathom.video/share/EhCEDjnJpZPueW4qt3jaxTNrXUFVyHJ7?tab=summary&timestamp=1127.0)
  - [Focus on mirroring expert content creation practices, not just AI generation](https://fathom.video/share/EhCEDjnJpZPueW4qt3jaxTNrXUFVyHJ7?tab=summary&timestamp=989.0)
  - [Human editors ensure quality, context, and brand alignment](https://fathom.video/share/EhCEDjnJpZPueW4qt3jaxTNrXUFVyHJ7?tab=summary&timestamp=1090.0)

### Distribution and Analytics

  - [GrowthX primarily focuses on content creation, not distribution](https://fathom.video/share/EhCEDjnJpZPueW4qt3jaxTNrXUFVyHJ7?tab=summary&timestamp=1161.0)
  - [Recommends tools like Koala for de-anonymizing website visitors and tracking potential leads](https://fathom.video/share/EhCEDjnJpZPueW4qt3jaxTNrXUFVyHJ7?tab=summary&timestamp=1243.0)
  - [Suggests creating lead magnets and strong CTAs to convert traffic](https://fathom.video/share/EhCEDjnJpZPueW4qt3jaxTNrXUFVyHJ7?tab=summary&timestamp=635.0)
  - [Emphasizes the importance of measuring content performance and attributing conversions](https://fathom.video/share/EhCEDjnJpZPueW4qt3jaxTNrXUFVyHJ7?tab=summary&timestamp=1819.0)

### Pilot Program and Expectations

  - [90-day pilot period offered, starting potentially on April 14th](https://fathom.video/share/EhCEDjnJpZPueW4qt3jaxTNrXUFVyHJ7?tab=summary&timestamp=1709.0)
  - [50,000 words per month for $9,000, with optional link-building service for $6,000](https://fathom.video/share/EhCEDjnJpZPueW4qt3jaxTNrXUFVyHJ7?tab=summary&timestamp=1709.0)
  - [GrowthX emphasizes long-term ROI, with initial focus on quality signals and publishing cadence](https://fathom.video/share/EhCEDjnJpZPueW4qt3jaxTNrXUFVyHJ7?tab=summary&timestamp=1824.0)
  - [Shaped expresses desire to see at least one conversion within 2-3 months to prove concept](https://fathom.video/share/EhCEDjnJpZPueW4qt3jaxTNrXUFVyHJ7?tab=summary&timestamp=1907.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to send Shaped an SOW (Statement of Work) with detailed scope and terms](https://fathom.video/share/EhCEDjnJpZPueW4qt3jaxTNrXUFVyHJ7?tab=summary&timestamp=2027.0)
  - [Shaped to consider implementing analytics tools like Koala for better lead tracking](https://fathom.video/share/EhCEDjnJpZPueW4qt3jaxTNrXUFVyHJ7?tab=summary&timestamp=1965.0)
  - [Both parties to continue discussions via shared Slack channel](https://fathom.video/share/EhCEDjnJpZPueW4qt3jaxTNrXUFVyHJ7?tab=summary&timestamp=2020.0)
  - [Shaped to evaluate timeline and readiness for potential April 14th start date](https://fathom.video/share/EhCEDjnJpZPueW4qt3jaxTNrXUFVyHJ7?tab=summary&timestamp=2040.0)
